title: Facility Operating Status
text:
https://www.opm.gov/policy-data-oversight/snow-dismissal-procedures/mobile-app/
Veterans/Military Crisis Line
Access for callers inside the continental U.S. is available to Service members, veterans and their families.
• Call: 988 and press 1 or 1-800-273-TALK (8255)
• Text: Dial 711, then 988
• Visit: https://www.veteranscrisisline.net/
• Chat: To text with a Crisis Line responder, send a text message to 838255 or through VeteransCrisisLine.net/Chat
